description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large glass windows, a double garage, and a prominent entryway with a paved walkway leading up to it. The house is surrounded by a rectangular yard enclosed by a dark fence, with landscaped greenery and trees concentrated at the rear. The rear of the house opens to a private garden area with a small circular pool and patio space. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark gray tones, with white accents and minimal ornamentation. The overall structure emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large glass windows, a double garage, and landscaped front and rear yards enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, paved walkway, and symmetrical facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the transition from the front yard to the rear garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, circular pool, patio area, and dense landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, side patio, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a paved walkway, steps, double doors, and minimal overhang, flanked by large windows and a double garage.
